message:
test(conformance): differential harness for poll.h+sys/select.h vs glibc

CONFORMANCE: libc poll.h+sys/select.h diff matrix.

4 functions, 11 tests via private socketpairs (no real network state):
- poll_empty_immediate, poll_writable_socketpair (fresh socketpair
  is writable), poll_readable_after_write (write 1 byte then poll),
  poll_invalid_fd_pollnval (POLLNVAL bit set), poll_timeout_zero_unready
- select_empty_immediate, select_writable_socketpair, select_readable_
  after_write
- ppoll_writable (timespec variant)
- pselect_empty_immediate (timespec + sigmask variant)

Per case we compare return value AND fd_set / pollfd bit state
(POLLOUT, POLLIN, POLLNVAL, FD_ISSET) against glibc reference.

0 divergences observed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
